questions.prompt: What title should the structured plan use?
questions.guidance: Initialize the plan section title before invoking planner-chat.

questions.prompt: Summarize the plan scope that planner-chat should expand into WBS rows.
questions.guidance: Ground the summary in synthesized brainstorm scores; do not re-run brainstorming scoring here.

questions.prompt: Invoke planner-chat to author structured plan sections and WBS from the brainstorm synthesis.
questions.guidance: Follow the planner-chat playbook after plan.title and plan.summary are set. Transition to reviewed when rubric review is recorded.

inputs.contextProblem: Ideas brainstorming is a hollow scoring survey: no guided ideation chat, no structured storage for agent-generated ideas/perspectives, and no mechanical seeding of plan drafts from brainstorm output.
inputs.contextAudience: Workflow Cannon operators capturing ideas and maintainers delivering Ideas→Plan improvements.
inputs.unknownsNotes: Ideation field shapes; transcript vs curated-only; qualitative synthesis across sessions; scoring optional ordering; dashboard rollup for qualitative content (see I005).
inputs.alternativesConsidered: Rejected: survey-only, sessionNotes blob, transcript-only, external brainstorm store. Preferred: additive ideation object + directive reframe + seed map + per-idea doc init on create-idea.
inputs.sessionNotes:
## Status
Manual capture after dogfood brainstorm. Session completed without further guided chat rounds — operator directed manual enrichment of idea/plan record.

## Current behavior (broken)
- agentDirective.questions[] is a 18-field scoring/elicitation form (score-1-10, text, enum only).
- brainstormSessionInputs is additionalProperties:false: 13 scores + contextProblem, contextAudience, unknownsNotes, alternativesConsidered, sessionNotes.
- update-brainstorm-session-handler SESSION_INPUT_FIELDS allowlist drops unknown keys.
- complete-brainstorm seeds plan.title from idea title and plan.summary from hardcoded placeholder unless planSummary passed manually.
- buildIdeaPlanningPrompt ignores brainstorm content entirely.
- applyBrainstormSectionSynthesis / synthesizeBrainstormScores only blend numeric scores across sessions.

## Target UX
- Natural chat: agent proposes feature ideas, perspectives, expectations, risks, alternatives — not only asks operator to score.
- Each turn ends with operator choice: save session & return later (partial update-brainstorm-session) OR finish brainstorming & start planning (complete-brainstorm).
- Qualitative outputs persist in structured session fields, not a sessionNotes blob.
- On promotion, brainstorm content mechanically stubs plan.summary, goals, openQuestions, assumptions, and warms planner-chat prompt.

## Proposed schema additions (ideation object on session)
ideation: {
  featureIdeas: [{ text, rationale? }],
  perspectives: [{ text }],
  expectations: [{ text }],
  openThreads: [{ text }],
  decisions: [{ text, rationale? }],
  transcript?: [{ role: "agent"|"operator", text, at }]
}
Keep existing scoring inputs separate. Both may be partial; ideation-rich completion should not require all 13 scores.

## Proposed agentDirective reframe
- Phases: context → ideation (agent contributes + elicits) → scoring (optional convergent) → checkpoint → session-notes.
- Add question types: agent-proposal, agent-perspective (not only score-1-10|text|enum).
- Add explicit checkpoint phase with save-vs-finish guidance.

## Plan seed map (complete-brainstorm / planning init)
- featureIdeas → goals[] + userStories[]
- openThreads → openQuestions[]
- perspectives + expectations → assumptions[] + valueAssessment narrative
- synthesized scores → valueAssessment metrics (existing)
- ideation digest → plan.summary + buildIdeaPlanningPrompt opening context

## Additional pipeline fixes discovered in dogfood
- create-idea should call buildIdeaOnlyUnifiedDocument and link planRef immediately.
- migrate-ideas-to-unified-document should not be the only path for new ideas.
- Align migrate dry-run policy tier docs with runtime (or exempt dry-run from policy gate).
- Related idea I005 tracks brainstorming dashboard rollup UX.

## Alternatives rejected
- Do nothing / keep survey-only brainstorm.
- sessionNotes-only blob storage (current workaround; not machine-seedable).
- Full transcript only without curated ideation fields.
- Separate brainstorm store outside unified IdeaPlan document.

## Open questions
- Field shape: plain string[] vs {text,rationale}[] for featureIdeas.
- Transcript capture: full vs curated-only.
- Qualitative multi-session synthesis: concatenate + agent summarize for v1?
- Should scoring move to post-ideation optional step in directive ordering?

## Acceptance criteria (for implementation task)
1. Structured ideation fields persist through update-brainstorm-session.
2. Agent directive supports ideation + checkpoint turns.
3. complete-brainstorm seeds plan sections from ideation + scores.
4. buildIdeaPlanningPrompt includes brainstorm digest.
5. create-idea auto-creates unified document.
6. Existing brainstorm sessions still validate.

## Dashboard projection (added)

## Dashboard projection (dogfood finding)
Unified IdeaPlan writes did not update the plan-artifact SQLite index, so dashboard Plans showed stale "Idea plan" titles and empty summaries even when plan.title/plan.summary were correct on disk.

Fix (in progress on branch):
- upsertIdeaPlanArtifactIndexFromDocument on every writeIdeaPlanArtifactVersion when sqliteDb is provided
- buildDashboardPlanArtifactSummary reads plan.title, plan.summary, version, updatedAt from unified IdeaPlan documents
- reconcileIdeaPlanArtifactIndexes(workspacePath, db) backfills stale index rows for existing workspaces

Acceptance: after any IdeaPlan mutation, dashboard-summary shows the current plan title/summary without manual reconcile.

decisions.text: D-1 Transcript vs curated ideation: Curated-only by default; transcript[] is opt-in per session only.
decisions.rationale: Operator choice 1-A. Planning seeds read ideation.* arrays, not raw chat logs.

decisions.text: D-2 featureIdeas field shape: Plain string[] for featureIdeas and decisions (not {text,rationale} objects).
decisions.rationale: Operator choice 2-B. Follow-up: align schema/handler with shipped rationale-object shape.

decisions.text: D-3 Multi-session qualitative synthesis: Add synthesizeBrainstormIdeation() to dedupe, rank, and summarize across sessions before complete-brainstorm.
decisions.rationale: Operator choice 3-B. Extends beyond concatenate-only v1 stub.

decisions.text: D-4 Scoring requirement vs ideation paths: Two explicit completion paths: ideation-complete OR scoring-complete (both valid for promotion).
decisions.rationale: Operator choice 4-B. Scoring is computationally cheap but UX-expensive (13+ survey fields); not quick for guided chat.

decisions.text: D-5 Dashboard brainstorming rollup: Rich Ideas-card rollup: surface top featureIdeas and openThreads snippets during brainstorming.
decisions.rationale: Operator choice 5-C. Scope with I005 / new dashboard slice; plan metadata sync alone is insufficient.

decisions.text: PQ-6 Ideation-complete bar: Explicit operator confirmation at checkpoint; persist ideationComplete:true on session when operator confirms readiness (no item-count rule).
PQ-7 synthesizeBrainstormIdeation algorithm: Deterministic merge: concatenate sessions, dedupe by normalized text, preserve latest-session ordering, cap each curated list (default top 10 per field).
decisions.rationale: Operator choice PQ-7-A. No LLM in command path.

decisions.text: PQ-8 Ideation field shapes: Plain string[] for featureIdeas and decisions only; perspectives/expectations/openThreads remain {text} objects.
PQ-9 Transcript opt-in mechanism: Implicit opt-in: omit transcript unless agent intentionally writes it; directive instructs no transcript by default.

PQ-10 Dashboard ideation surfaces: Dedicated Brainstorming rollup slice (I005-aligned) with ideation snippets; Ideas card shows badge+link. Ideas rollup also lists idea rows that are not brainstorming and not yet promoted to a plan.
decisions.rationale: Operator choice PQ-10-C with Ideas-rollup inclusion amendment.

decisions.text: PQ-11 Execution task model: WBS is source of truth; materialize execution tasks only at plan finalize/execute. T100807 retired (superseded by WBS-1..7).
PQ-12 Plan accept gate: Accept plan now as execution blueprint; implementation gaps remain tracked on WBS follow-ups until execute.

plan.title: Make brainstorming a real guided ideation session that seeds the plan
plan.summary: Transform Ideas brainstorming from a scoring survey into guided ideation that seeds the plan draft, persists structured session output, and keeps dashboard plan metadata in sync.

identity.title: Make brainstorming a real guided ideation session that seeds the plan
identity.summary: Transform Ideas brainstorming from a scoring survey into guided ideation that seeds the plan draft, persists structured session output, and keeps dashboard plan metadata in sync.

goals: Operators get a guided ideation brainstorm with agent contributions and save/finish checkpoints
Brainstorm content mechanically seeds plan.summary, goals, open questions, and planner-chat context
New ideas auto-create a linked unified IdeaPlan document without a global migration
Dashboard Plans show current unified plan titles and summaries after IdeaPlan writes
Ideas rollup shows open ideas including those not yet brainstorming and not yet promoted to a plan
Dashboard plan review actions give clear in-panel feedback (success, failure, and post-review state)

userStories.iWant: the brainstorm agent to propose feature ideas and perspectives
userStories.soThat: ideation is collaborative instead of a scoring form

userStories.iWant: to save partial brainstorm progress and return later
userStories.soThat: guided sessions can span multiple chats

userStories.iWant: complete-brainstorm to seed the first plan draft
userStories.soThat: planner-chat starts warm instead of cold

valueAssessment.impact: Fixes the core Ideas→Plan handoff gap discovered in I009 dogfood; unblocks trustworthy planning from brainstorm output.
valueAssessment.rationale: Dogfood on I009 reproduced the failure mode and validated the v1 design.

riskAssessment.description: Schema changes could break legacy brainstorm sessions
riskAssessment.mitigation: Additive ideation fields and ideation-rich validation fallback; keep existing scoring path.

technicalImpact.compatibilityNotes: Backward compatible with I005/I007 style score-only sessions.

criticalPaths: dashboard plan review posts webview feedback and clears busy state

implementationGuidance: PQ-6: add session.ideationComplete set only when operator confirms at checkpoint directive turn.
PQ-7: implement deterministic synthesizeBrainstormIdeation with dedupe, latest-session order, per-field cap (10).
PQ-8: migrate featureIdeas/decisions to string[]; keep {text} wrappers for perspectives/expectations/openThreads.
PQ-9: update brainstorming directive — do not capture transcript unless operator/agent explicitly opts in.
PQ-10: Brainstorming dashboard slice + Ideas rollup rules (non-brainstorm, not-yet-planned ideas); Ideas card badge links to slice.
PQ-11: do not create execution tasks until WBS materialization; do not assign phase keys or task IDs in the plan artifact.
PQ-12: accept plan as blueprint; land implementation via WBS-generated tasks at execute.
Phase assignment: defer all phase roster selection to finalize/execute; planner creates phase catalog entries for new phases when materializing WBS rows.
Dashboard review UX: post webview mutation result on plan review; clear busy state on failure; in-panel toast; surface reviewed state after success.
Index sync belongs on every IdeaPlan write path.
Record D-1..D-5 and PQ-6..PQ-12 in plan review evidence.
whatNotToDo: Do not store qualitative ideation only in sessionNotes
Do not require migrate-ideas-to-unified-document for new ideas
Do not pre-materialize WBS rows as execution tasks before plan finalize/execute
Do not assign specific phase keys or execution task IDs in the plan artifact
Do not pre-assign WBS rows to a fixed phase roster during planning
assumptions: Transcript capture is implicit opt-in only; curated ideation arrays are the default planning seed source.
featureIdeas and decisions use plain string[]; perspectives/expectations/openThreads use {text} objects.
Brainstorm promotion accepts ideation-complete (operator-confirmed ideationComplete flag) OR scoring-complete sessions.
Multi-session ideation uses deterministic synthesizeBrainstormIdeation before plan seeding.
Ideas rollup includes open ideas not yet in brainstorming and not yet promoted to a plan.
Plan is an execution blueprint (PQ-12-A); task materialization and phase roster assignment wait for finalize/execute.
finalize-plan-to-phase (or equivalent) resolves target phases per WBS row at materialization time, creating new phase catalog entries when needed.

wbs.title: Ideation schema and session persistence
goalMapping: Operators get a guided ideation brainstorm with agent contributions and save/finish checkpoints
wbs.suggestedTaskTitle: Add brainstorm session ideation object and handler support
wbs.approach: Extend brainstorm-session schema/types; parse and merge ideation in update-brainstorm-session; allow ideation-rich planning validation. Add ideationComplete flag on operator checkpoint confirmation (PQ-6). Align featureIdeas/decisions to string[] (PQ-8-A).
acceptanceCriteria: update-brainstorm-session persists ideation fields per PQ-8 shapes
ideationComplete:true is set only on operator-confirmed checkpoint (PQ-6)
validateBrainstormSectionForPlanning accepts ideationComplete OR scoring-complete
wbs.doneMeans: Structured ideation survives session updates and validates for planning promotion.

wbs.title: Plan accept, dogfood replay, and WBS execution handoff
goalMapping: Operators get a guided ideation brainstorm with agent contributions and save/finish checkpoints
Brainstorm content mechanically seeds plan.summary, goals, open questions, and planner-chat context
wbs.suggestedTaskTitle: Accept plan blueprint and materialize WBS tasks at execute
wbs.approach: Accept plan as execution blueprint (PQ-12-A). At finalize/execute, materialize all WBS rows into execution tasks (not before). Planner resolves phase rosters at materialization time—creating new phase catalog entries when needed—without pre-assigned phase keys in the plan. Run end-to-end dogfood replay as acceptance evidence.
acceptanceCriteria: Plan accepted as execution blueprint with PQ-6..PQ-12 recorded
End-to-end dogfood replay documented before WBS task materialization
Execution tasks created only from WBS rows at finalize/execute (not pre-materialized)
Materialization assigns tasks to phase rosters resolved at finalize time (no phase keys pinned in plan artifact)
testingVerification: I009 dogfood replay from create-idea through start-idea-planning
wbs.doneMeans: Plan accepted; WBS ready for task generation at execute with planner-resolved phase assignment.

generatedTaskPayload.title: Accept plan blueprint and materialize WBS at execute
generatedTaskPayload.approach: Plan accept + dogfood evidence; defer WBS task materialization and phase assignment to finalize.
acceptanceCriteria: Plan accepted as execution blueprint
WBS rows materialize to tasks at finalize with planner-resolved phases
No execution task IDs or phase keys are required in the plan artifact

Ideas dashboard cards show qualitative brainstorm snippets (featureIdeas, openThreads) while sessions are in progress

wbs.approach: Implement deterministic synthesizeBrainstormIdeation (PQ-7-A). Add Brainstorming dashboard rollup slice and Ideas rollup rules: show non-brainstorming, not-yet-planned ideas plus ideation snippets (PQ-10).
acceptanceCriteria: synthesizeBrainstormIdeation dedupes, orders by latest session, caps lists (10 per field)
Brainstorming rollup slice shows ideation snippets for active brainstorm sessions
Ideas rollup includes ideas not in brainstorming and not yet promoted to a plan
Ideas card shows ideation badge linking to Brainstorming slice
wbs.doneMeans: Operator decisions D-3 and D-5 are implemented in synthesis and dashboard surfaces.

wbs.title: Dashboard plan review feedback loop
goalMapping: Dashboard plan review actions give clear in-panel feedback (success, failure, and post-review state)
wbs.suggestedTaskTitle: Improve dashboard plan review success and failure feedback
wbs.approach: On plan-artifact review from the dashboard: post wcPlanArtifactMutationResult to the webview; clear Reviewing button busy state on failure; show in-panel toast on success/failure; after success refresh Plans section and surface Reviewed bucket state (Accept enabled when approval_ready).
acceptanceCriteria: Failed review clears Reviewing busy state and shows visible error feedback in-panel or via host toast
Successful review shows visible success feedback and Plans card moves to reviewed/approval_ready actions
Review with zero findings still communicates completion (not a silent refresh only)
wbs.doneMeans: Operators can tell whether dashboard Review succeeded without hunting for bucket moves or missed host toasts.

generatedTaskPayload.title: Improve dashboard plan review success and failure feedback
generatedTaskPayload.approach: Webview mutation result + busy-state cleanup + in-panel toast for plan review.
acceptanceCriteria: Review failure resets button state and surfaces error
Review success surfaces confirmation and updated plan card actions

phaseRecommendations.label: Resolved at finalize
phaseRecommendations.rationale: Execution phases are not chosen during planning. When WBS rows convert to tasks at finalize/execute, the planner assigns each row to an appropriate phase roster and registers new phases in the catalog as needed.
